title: 在 Codex 中使用子智能体和自定义智能体
author: Simon Willison
content:
16th March 2026 - Link Blog

Use subagents and custom agents in Codex. Subagents were announced in general availability today for OpenAI Codex, after several weeks of preview behind a feature flag.

They're very similar to the Claude Code implementation, with default subagents for "explorer", "worker" and "default". It's unclear to me what the difference between "worker" and "default" is but based on their CSV example I think "worker" is intended for running large numbers of small tasks in parallel.

Codex also lets you define custom agents as TOML files in ~/.codex/agents/. These can have custom instructions and be assigned to use specific models - including gpt-5.3-codex-spark if you want some raw speed. They can then be referenced by name, as demonstrated by this example prompt from the documentation:

Investigate why the settings modal fails to save. Have browser_debugger reproduce it, code_mapper trace the responsible code path, and ui_fixer implement the smallest fix once the failure mode is clear.

The subagents pattern is widely supported in coding agents now. Here's documentation across a number of different platforms:

  • OpenAI Codex subagents
  • Claude Code subagents
  • Gemini CLI subagents (experimental)
  • Mistral Vibe subagents
  • OpenCode agents
  • Subagents in Visual Studio Code
  • Cursor Subagents
aiSummary: OpenAI Codex 已正式发布子智能体和自定义智能体支持，这反映了 AI 编码工具中多智能体编排日益增长的行业趋势。
oneSentenceSummary: OpenAI Codex 已正式发布子智能体和自定义智能体支持，这反映了 AI 编码工具中多智能体编排日益增长的行业趋势。
summary: 本文宣布 OpenAI Codex 中的子智能体功能已全面可用，该功能允许主 AI 将专业任务委托给 'explorer' 或 'worker' 等下属智能体。作者将此实现与 Claude Code 进行了比较，并强调了使用 TOML 文件定义自定义智能体的能力，这些智能体可以映射到 gpt-5.3-codex-spark 等特定模型以优化性能。至关重要的是，文章指出 '子智能体模式'——即编排多个专门的 LLM 实例用于调试、映射和修复——已成为 Gemini、Mistral、VS Code 和 Cursor 等主要平台的标准架构。

mainPoints.point: OpenAI Codex 现已支持用于任务委托的专业子智能体。
mainPoints.explanation: 该系统包含 'explorer' 和 'worker' 等默认智能体，用于处理开发过程的不同方面，类似于 Claude Code 中的架构。

mainPoints.point: 开发者可以使用本地 TOML 配置文件创建自定义智能体。
mainPoints.explanation: 通过将文件放置在 `~/.codex/agents/` 中，用户可以定义自定义指令并将特定模型分配给智能体，从而实现对智能体行为和速度的精细控制。

mainPoints.point: '子智能体模式' 正在成为 AI 辅助工程中的标准。
mainPoints.explanation: 文章提供了一份采用子智能体架构的主要平台（Cursor、VS Code、Mistral 等）的全面列表，这预示着向多智能体工作流的转变。

keyQuotes: 子智能体模式现在已在编码智能体中得到广泛支持。
Codex 还允许您在 ~/.codex/agents/ 中将自定义智能体定义为 TOML 文件。这些智能体可以拥有自定义指令，并被分配使用特定模型。
调查设置模态框为何无法保存。让 browser_debugger 重现问题，code_mapper 追踪负责的代码路径，一旦故障模式明确，由 ui_fixer 实施最小的修复。
